from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

SRC = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"

# Explicit superset schema: any absent field parses as NULL (never UNRESOLVED_COLUMN).
_S = T.StringType()
SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(n, _S) for n in [
    "type", "kind", "event", "record_type",
    "payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id",
    "amount", "value", "amount_original", "original_amount", "amt",
    "currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur",
    "occurred_at", "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "created_at",
    "time", "datetime", "paid_at",
    "rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_per_unit",
    "rate_to_usd", "conversion_rate",
    "usd_amount", "amount_usd", "date", "day", "rate_date",
]])

# Currencies we recognize; anything else is set aside (quarantined), not lost.
KNOWN = ["USD", "EUR", "GBP", "JPY", "CAD", "AUD", "CHF", "CNY", "INR", "MXN",
         "BRL", "SEK", "NOK", "DKK", "NZD", "SGD", "HKD", "ZAR", "PLN", "CZK",
         "HUF", "TRY", "KRW", "THB", "AED", "SAR", "ILS", "RUB", "IDR", "MYR"]


def _first(cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cols])


def _parse_ts(c):
    c = c.cast("string")
    # epoch-millis (all digits, >=13)
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000.0).cast("timestamp"))
    # naive (no offset) -> tag as UTC before parsing so session tz can't reinterpret
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(ts):
    # UTC calendar day, independent of session timezone
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(SRC)

    amount = _first(["amount", "value", "amount_original", "original_amount", "amt"]).cast("double")
    currency = F.upper(F.trim(_first(["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur"])))
    ts_raw = _first(["occurred_at", "ts", "timestamp", "event_time",
                     "created_at", "time", "datetime", "paid_at"])
    rate = _first(["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate",
                   "usd_per_unit", "rate_to_usd", "conversion_rate"]).cast("double")

    df = (raw
          .withColumn("amount", amount)
          .withColumn("currency", currency)
          .withColumn("ts_raw", ts_raw)
          .withColumn("rate_in", rate)
          # keep only payment records (they carry an amount)
          .where(F.col("amount").isNotNull()))

    ts = _parse_ts(F.col("ts_raw"))
    # USD is unit rate; other recognized currencies use their day's rate from the feed
    rate_final = F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"),
                        F.coalesce(F.col("rate_in"), F.lit(1.0))).otherwise(F.col("rate_in"))

    recognized = F.col("currency").isin(KNOWN)

    out = (df
           .withColumn("event_ts", ts)
           .withColumn("settlement_date", _utc_day(ts))
           .withColumn("rate_final", rate_final)
           .withColumn("usd_value", F.col("amount") * F.col("rate_final"))
           .withColumn("recognized", recognized)
           .withColumn("is_valid",
                       recognized
                       & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
                       & F.col("usd_value").isNotNull()))
    return out.select("settlement_date", "currency", "amount",
                      "rate_final", "usd_value", "recognized", "is_valid")


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_parsed")
    return (src
            .where(F.col("is_valid"))
            .groupBy(F.col("settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"))
            .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_rejected")
def payments_rejected():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_parsed")
    return (src
            .where(~F.col("is_valid"))
            .select("settlement_date", "currency", "amount", "usd_value", "recognized"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"


def _gj(col, *paths):
    # coalesce across candidate JSON key spellings; all lazy, no analysis
    return F.coalesce(*[F.get_json_object(col, p) for p in paths])


def _parse_ts(c):
    # three shapes: epoch-millis, offset-aware, and naive(=UTC wall clock)
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(ts):
    # session-tz-independent UTC calendar day
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


# ---- source (read as TEXT => fixed schema, no inference job / no analysis) ----

@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    v = F.col("value")
    df = SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA)

    amt_raw = _gj(v, "$.amount", "$.amt", "$.paid_amount", "$.value")
    cur = F.upper(F.trim(_gj(v, "$.currency", "$.ccy", "$.currency_code", "$.cur")))
    ts_raw = _gj(v, "$.occurred_at", "$.ts", "$.timestamp", "$.event_time",
                 "$.paid_at", "$.time", "$.created_at", "$.settlement_ts")

    payments = df.where(amt_raw.isNotNull())
    ts = _parse_ts(ts_raw)
    return (
        payments.select(
            cur.alias("currency"),
            F.regexp_replace(amt_raw, ",", "").cast("double").alias("amount"),
            ts_raw.alias("ts_raw"),
            _utc_day(ts).alias("pay_day"),
        )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    v = F.col("value")
    df = SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA)

    rate_raw = _gj(v, "$.rate", "$.usd_rate", "$.fx_rate", "$.usd_per_unit", "$.rate_to_usd")
    amt_raw = _gj(v, "$.amount", "$.amt", "$.paid_amount", "$.value")
    cur = F.upper(F.trim(_gj(v, "$.currency", "$.ccy", "$.currency_code", "$.cur")))
    date_raw = _gj(v, "$.date", "$.rate_date", "$.as_of", "$.day", "$.effective_date")

    rates = df.where(rate_raw.isNotNull() & amt_raw.isNull())
    return (
        rates.select(
            cur.alias("rate_currency"),
            F.to_date(date_raw).alias("rate_day"),
            rate_raw.cast("double").alias("rate"),
        )
        .where(F.col("rate_currency").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_day").isNotNull())
        .groupBy("rate_currency", "rate_day")
        .agg(F.avg("rate").alias("rate"))  # deterministic dedup per (ccy, day)
    )


# ---- quarantine: unknown currency or unparseable timestamp ----

@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_rejected")
def payments_rejected():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("payments_parsed")
    r = spark.read.table("fx_rates")
    j = p.join(
        r,
        (p["currency"] == r["rate_currency"]) & (p["pay_day"] == r["rate_day"]),
        "left",
    )
    recognized = (F.col("currency") == "USD") | F.col("rate").isNotNull()
    return (
        j.where((~recognized) | F.col("pay_day").isNull())
        .select("currency", "amount", "ts_raw", "pay_day")
    )


# ---- contract output: usd_daily(settlement_date DATE, usd_total) ----

@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("payments_parsed")
    r = spark.read.table("fx_rates")

    j = p.join(
        r,
        (p["currency"] == r["rate_currency"]) & (p["pay_day"] == r["rate_day"]),
        "left",
    )
    eff_rate = F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("rate"))
    recognized = (F.col("currency") == "USD") | F.col("rate").isNotNull()

    return (
        j.where(recognized & F.col("pay_day").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNotNull())
        .select(
            F.col("pay_day").alias("settlement_date"),
            (F.col("amount") * eff_rate).alias("usd_amount"),
        )
        .groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"), "usd_total")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed3141.ndjson"

# Explicit union schema over both payment and rate record shapes.
# Explicit schema => no schema-inference job (avoids ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS) and no
# missing-column analysis errors: fields absent in a row simply read as NULL.
CANDIDATE_FIELDS = [
    "type", "record_type", "kind",
    "payment_id", "id", "txn_id",
    "event_time", "occurred_at", "ts", "timestamp", "paid_at", "created_at",
    "time", "event_ts", "payment_time",
    "currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code",
    "amount", "value", "native_amount", "amount_native",
    "rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "usd_per_unit", "rate_to_usd",
    "conversion_rate", "exchange_rate",
    "rate_date", "as_of_date", "date", "day", "effective_date", "fx_date",
]
_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(f, StringType(), True) for f in CANDIDATE_FIELDS])

TS_CANDS   = ["event_time", "occurred_at", "ts", "timestamp", "paid_at",
              "created_at", "time", "event_ts", "payment_time"]
CCY_CANDS  = ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "currency_code"]
AMT_CANDS  = ["amount", "value", "native_amount", "amount_native"]
RATE_CANDS = ["rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "usd_per_unit", "rate_to_usd",
              "conversion_rate", "exchange_rate"]
RDATE_CANDS = ["rate_date", "as_of_date", "date", "day", "effective_date", "fx_date"]


def _coalesce(cands):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cands])


def _parse_ts(c):
    # Handle all three timestamp shapes or rows silently vanish.
    epoch = (c.cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")           # epoch-millis
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c) \
              .otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))                          # naive => UTC
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), epoch).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(ts):
    # UTC calendar day, independent of the (non-UTC) session tz.
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


def _to_day(c):
    # Identical day-bucketing rule for EVERY joined date column.
    dateonly = F.to_date(c)
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"), dateonly).otherwise(_utc_day(_parse_ts(c)))


@dp.materialized_view(name="feed_raw")
def feed_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(_SCHEMA).json(PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.feed_raw")
    ccy = F.upper(_coalesce(CCY_CANDS))
    rate = _coalesce(RATE_CANDS).cast("double")
    amt = _coalesce(AMT_CANDS).cast("double")
    rdate = _coalesce(RDATE_CANDS)
    r = (df.where(rate.isNotNull() & rdate.isNotNull() & amt.isNull())
           .select(ccy.alias("r_currency"),
                   _to_day(rdate).alias("r_day"),
                   rate.alias("r_rate")))
    return r.groupBy("r_currency", "r_day").agg(F.max("r_rate").alias("r_rate"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_usd")
def payments_usd():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.feed_raw")
    rates = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates")

    ts = _coalesce(TS_CANDS)
    ccy = F.upper(_coalesce(CCY_CANDS))
    amt = _coalesce(AMT_CANDS).cast("double")
    own_rate = _coalesce(RATE_CANDS).cast("double")

    # Every record carrying monetary value is a payment (keep all -> lose no value).
    pays = (df.where(amt.isNotNull())
              .select(ccy.alias("currency"),
                      amt.alias("amount"),
                      own_rate.alias("own_rate"),
                      _to_day(ts).alias("settlement_date")))

    j = pays.join(
        rates,
        (pays["currency"] == rates["r_currency"]) & (pays["settlement_date"] == rates["r_day"]),
        "left",
    )
    # Correct day rate: USD=1, else the payment's own day rate, else the joined day rate.
    eff = F.coalesce(
        F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)),
        F.col("own_rate"),
        F.col("r_rate"),
    )
    return (j.withColumn("eff_rate", eff)
             .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_rejects")
def usd_rejects():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_usd")
    # Unrecognized currency (no rate) or unparseable day => set aside, not dropped.
    return df.where(F.col("eff_rate").isNull() | F.col("settlement_date").isNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_usd")
    return (df.where(F.col("eff_rate").isNotNull() & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
              .groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed5772.ndjson"
CAT = "spark_catalog.default."

# Permissive schema: every candidate field as string so absent fields => null (no AnalysisException).
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("kind", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("value", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency_code", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ccy", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("occurred_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("paid_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("usd_rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_to_usd", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("as_of", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("as_of_date", T.StringType()),
])


def parse_ts(c):
    c = c.cast("string")
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def utc_day(ts):
    # session-tz-independent UTC calendar day of an instant
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_feed")
def parsed_feed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.text(DATA)
    return df.select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("j")).select("j.*")


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_norm")
def payments_norm():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(CAT + "parsed_feed")
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value")).cast("double")
    ccy = F.upper(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("currency_code"), F.col("ccy"))))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
                        F.col("event_time"), F.col("created_at"), F.col("paid_at"), F.col("time"))
    ts = parse_ts(ts_raw)
    out = df.select(
        amount.alias("amount"),
        ccy.alias("currency"),
        ts_raw.alias("ts_raw"),
        utc_day(ts).alias("settlement_date"),
    )
    # A payment row is one carrying a monetary amount.
    return out.where(F.col("amount").isNotNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="rates_norm")
def rates_norm():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(CAT + "parsed_feed")
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value")).cast("double")
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("usd_rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd")).cast("double")
    ccy = F.upper(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("currency_code"), F.col("ccy"))))
    day_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("date"), F.col("as_of"), F.col("as_of_date"))
    rate_day = F.coalesce(F.to_date(day_raw), utc_day(parse_ts(day_raw)))
    rows = df.select(amount.alias("amount"), rate.alias("rate_val"),
                     ccy.alias("currency"), rate_day.alias("rate_day"))
    # A rate row carries a rate and no monetary amount.
    rows = rows.where(F.col("rate_val").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNull()
                      & F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_day").isNotNull())
    # Deterministic dedup to one rate per currency/day.
    return rows.groupBy("currency", "rate_day").agg(F.max("rate_val").alias("rate_val"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_usd")
def payments_usd():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table(CAT + "payments_norm").alias("p")
    r = spark.read.table(CAT + "rates_norm").alias("r")
    joined = p.join(
        r,
        (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) & (F.col("p.settlement_date") == F.col("r.rate_day")),
        "left",
    )
    is_usd = F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD")
    rate = F.when(is_usd, F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r.rate_val"))
    recognized = (
        F.col("p.settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & (is_usd | F.col("r.rate_val").isNotNull())
    )
    return joined.select(
        F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.amount").alias("amount"),
        (F.col("p.amount") * rate).alias("usd_amount"),
        recognized.alias("recognized"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_rejects")
def usd_rejects():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return spark.read.table(CAT + "payments_usd").where(~F.col("recognized"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(CAT + "payments_usd").where(F.col("recognized"))
    return (
        df.groupBy("settlement_date")
          .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
          .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"), "usd_total")
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed11235.ndjson"

# --- candidate field spellings (superset; explicit schema => never UNRESOLVED) ---
TS   = ["ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "occurred_at", "created_at", "time",
        "paid_at", "payment_time"]
AMT  = ["amount", "value", "amount_original", "original_amount", "paid_amount",
        "payment_amount"]
CUR  = ["currency", "currency_code", "ccy", "curr"]
RATE = ["rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "usd_per_unit", "rate_to_usd",
        "conversion_rate"]
DATE = ["date", "rate_date", "day", "as_of", "effective_date", "rate_day"]

_ALL = []
for _n in TS + AMT + CUR + RATE + DATE:
    if _n not in _ALL:
        _ALL.append(_n)
SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(n, T.StringType(), True) for n in _ALL])


def _instant(c):
    """Parse the three timestamp shapes into a correct absolute instant."""
    c = c.cast("string")
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(c):
    """Session-tz-independent UTC calendar day; handles date-only and timestamp strings.
    IDENTICAL expression applied to both the payment date and the rate date."""
    c = c.cast("string")
    dateonly = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"), F.to_date(c))
    ts = _instant(c)
    return F.coalesce(dateonly, F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone())))


def _base(spark):
    raw = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)
    return raw.select(
        F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in TS]).alias("ts_str"),
        F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in AMT]).alias("amount_str"),
        F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in CUR]).alias("currency"),
        F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in RATE]).alias("rate_str"),
        F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in DATE]).alias("date_str"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="pay_conv")
def pay_conv():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    base = _base(spark)

    # Payments: rows carrying an amount.
    pay = base.where(F.col("amount_str").isNotNull()).select(
        F.col("amount_str").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.upper(F.trim(F.col("currency"))).alias("ccy"),
        _utc_day(F.col("ts_str")).alias("pay_day"),
    )

    # FX rate dimension: rows carrying a rate. Same UTC-day bucketing on the rate date.
    fx = (
        base.where(F.col("rate_str").isNotNull())
        .select(
            F.upper(F.trim(F.col("currency"))).alias("rccy"),
            _utc_day(F.coalesce(F.col("date_str"), F.col("ts_str"))).alias("rday"),
            F.col("rate_str").cast("double").alias("rrate0"),
        )
        .where(F.col("rday").isNotNull() & F.col("rrate0").isNotNull())
        .groupBy("rccy", "rday")
        .agg(F.max("rrate0").alias("rrate"))  # deterministic per (ccy, day)
    )

    conv = pay.join(
        fx,
        (F.col("ccy") == F.col("rccy")) & (F.col("pay_day") == F.col("rday")),
        "left",
    )

    eff_rate = F.when(F.col("ccy") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("rrate"))
    recognized = (
        eff_rate.isNotNull()
        & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
        & F.col("pay_day").isNotNull()
    )

    return conv.select(
        F.col("pay_day"),
        F.col("ccy"),
        F.col("amount"),
        eff_rate.alias("eff_rate"),
        (F.col("amount") * eff_rate).alias("usd_amount"),
        recognized.alias("recognized"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    conv = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.pay_conv")
    return (
        conv.where(F.col("recognized"))
        .groupBy("pay_day")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("pay_day").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("usd_total"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_rejects")
def usd_rejects():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    conv = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.pay_conv")
    return conv.where(~F.col("recognized")).select(
        F.col("pay_day"),
        F.col("ccy"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_amount"))
        .when(F.col("pay_day").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
        .otherwise(F.lit("unrecognized_currency"))
        .alias("reject_reason"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed27182.ndjson"

# Permissive schema: every plausible field name -> missing ones become NULL
# (prevents UNRESOLVED_COLUMN on this messy feed).
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("record_type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("kind", T.StringType()),
    # amount aliases
    T.StructField("amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("value", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("native_amount", T.StringType()),
    # currency aliases
    T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency_code", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ccy", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("cur", T.StringType()),
    # timestamp aliases
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("occurred_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("paid_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("time", T.StringType()),
    # rate aliases
    T.StructField("rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("usd_rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_to_usd", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("usd_per_unit", T.StringType()),
    # rate-date aliases
    T.StructField("rate_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("as_of", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("day", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("effective_date", T.StringType()),
])


def _parse_ts(c):
    """Handle the three timestamp shapes; unparseable -> NULL (routed to rejects)."""
    is_epoch = c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$")
    # naive (no offset) means UTC wall-clock: tag as Z BEFORE parsing
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.when(is_epoch, (c.cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")) \
            .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(ts):
    # UTC calendar day, independent of session timezone
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_events")
def parsed_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA)
    d = raw.select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("d")).select("d.*")
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount").cast("double"),
                        F.col("value").cast("double"),
                        F.col("native_amount").cast("double"))
    currency = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("currency_code"),
                                  F.col("ccy"), F.col("cur")))
    ts_str = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("occurred_at"),
                        F.col("ts"), F.col("created_at"), F.col("paid_at"), F.col("time"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate").cast("double"), F.col("usd_rate").cast("double"),
                      F.col("rate_to_usd").cast("double"), F.col("fx_rate").cast("double"),
                      F.col("usd_per_unit").cast("double"))
    rate_date_str = F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("date"), F.col("as_of"),
                               F.col("day"), F.col("effective_date"))
    return d.select(
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        ts_str.alias("ts_str"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        rate_date_str.alias("rate_date_str"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed_events")
    r = p.where(F.col("rate").isNotNull()
                & F.col("rate_date_str").isNotNull()
                & F.col("currency").isNotNull())
    rd = _utc_day(_parse_ts(F.col("rate_date_str")))
    return r.select(F.col("currency"), rd.alias("rate_day"), F.col("rate"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_clean")
def payments_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed_events")
    # payment = has amount+timestamp and is NOT a rate record
    pay = p.where(F.col("amount").isNotNull() & F.col("ts_str").isNotNull()
                  & ~(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_date_str").isNotNull()))
    day = _utc_day(_parse_ts(F.col("ts_str")))
    return pay.select(F.col("currency"), F.col("amount"), day.alias("settlement_date"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_payments")
def rejected_payments():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_clean")
    rates = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates")
    rate_ccy = rates.select(F.col("currency").alias("rc")).distinct()
    j = pay.join(rate_ccy, pay["currency"] == F.col("rc"), "left")
    # set aside: unknown currency OR unparseable timestamp (value preserved, not dropped)
    rej = j.where(~((F.col("currency") == "USD") | F.col("rc").isNotNull())
                  | F.col("settlement_date").isNull())
    return rej.select("currency", "amount", "settlement_date")


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_clean")
    rates = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates")

    rate_ccy = rates.select(F.col("currency").alias("rc")).distinct()
    recognized = pay.join(rate_ccy, pay["currency"] == F.col("rc"), "left")
    good = recognized.where(((F.col("currency") == "USD") | F.col("rc").isNotNull())
                            & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())

    pay_daily = good.groupBy("currency", "settlement_date").agg(F.sum("amount").alias("amt"))

    rates2 = rates.select(F.col("currency").alias("r_currency"),
                          F.col("rate_day").alias("r_rate_day"),
                          F.col("rate").alias("r_rate"))
    j = pay_daily.join(rates2, pay_daily["currency"] == rates2["r_currency"], "left")
    j = j.withColumn("dd", F.abs(F.datediff(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("r_rate_day"))))
    # closest available rate to the payment's own day (exact day wins; ties -> later date)
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "settlement_date").orderBy(
        F.col("dd").asc_nulls_last(), F.col("r_rate_day").desc())
    j = j.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    eff_rate = F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r_rate"))
    conv = j.select(F.col("settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
                    (F.col("amt") * eff_rate).alias("usd_amt"))
    return conv.groupBy("settlement_date").agg(F.sum("usd_amt").alias("usd_total"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed16180.ndjson"

# Permissive superset schema: every candidate column is declared, so referencing
# any of them can never raise UNRESOLVED_COLUMN; absent fields simply read NULL.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("type", StringType()), StructField("record_type", StringType()),
    StructField("kind", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()), StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()), StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()), StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()), StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()), StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("time", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()), StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()), StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_per_unit", DoubleType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()), StructField("rate_date", StringType()),
    StructField("as_of", StringType()), StructField("as_of_date", StringType()),
    StructField("day", StringType()),
])

AMT  = lambda: F.coalesce("amount", "value").cast("double")
CCY  = lambda: F.upper(F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code"))
RATE = lambda: F.coalesce("rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "usd_per_unit").cast("double")
RDT  = lambda: F.coalesce("rate_date", "date", "as_of", "as_of_date", "day")
TSC  = lambda: F.coalesce("ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "occurred_at",
                          "created_at", "event_ts", "time")

def parse_ts(c):
    # three shapes: epoch-millis, then offset-aware / naive(=UTC wall clock)
    return F.coalesce(
        F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp")),
        F.to_timestamp(F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c)
                        .otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))),
    )

def utc_day(ts):
    # session-tz-independent UTC calendar day
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze")
def bronze():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("bronze")
    # rate rows carry a rate but no payment amount
    return (b.where(AMT().isNull() & RATE().isNotNull())
             .select(CCY().alias("rate_ccy"),
                     F.to_date(RDT()).alias("rate_day"),
                     RATE().alias("usd_rate")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    b = spark.read.table("bronze")
    rates = spark.read.table("fx_rates")

    pays = (b.where(AMT().isNotNull())
             .select(AMT().alias("amount"),
                     CCY().alias("ccy"),
                     utc_day(parse_ts(TSC())).alias("pay_day")))

    j = pays.join(rates,
                  (pays["ccy"] == rates["rate_ccy"]) & (pays["pay_day"] == rates["rate_day"]),
                  "left")

    # USD converts 1:1; recognized foreign currencies use the day's rate.
    rate_final = F.when(F.col("ccy") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("usd_rate"))

    kept = (j.withColumn("usd_rate_final", rate_final)
             # drop unrecognized-currency and unparseable-timestamp rows from totals
             .where(F.col("usd_rate_final").isNotNull() & F.col("pay_day").isNotNull())
             .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("usd_rate_final")))

    return (kept.groupBy(F.col("pay_day").alias("settlement_date"))
                .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"), F.col("usd_total")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed14142.ndjson"

def _spark():
    return SparkSession.active()

# ---- schema-agnostic field extraction (missing keys -> null, never an error) ----
def _pick(paths):
    j = F.col("value")
    return F.coalesce(*[F.get_json_object(j, p) for p in paths])

TS_FIELDS   = ["$.occurred_at","$.event_time","$.event_ts","$.timestamp","$.ts",
               "$.paid_at","$.created_at","$.time","$.payment_time","$.datetime"]
AMT_FIELDS  = ["$.amount","$.value","$.amount_foreign","$.foreign_amount","$.amt",
               "$.payment_amount","$.gross_amount","$.total"]
CCY_FIELDS  = ["$.currency","$.ccy","$.currency_code","$.curr","$.cur"]
RDATE_FIELDS= ["$.rate_date","$.date","$.as_of","$.as_of_date","$.day",
               "$.effective_date","$.valid_date"]
RATE_FIELDS = ["$.rate","$.usd_rate","$.usd_per_unit","$.to_usd","$.fx_rate",
               "$.usd_per","$.conversion_rate"]

# ---- robust timestamp parsing: offset-aware / naive-UTC / epoch-millis ----
def parse_ts(c):
    epoch = (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp")
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), epoch).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged))

# ---- UTC calendar day, independent of session timezone ----
def utc_day(ts):
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))

def rate_day(c):
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"), F.to_date(c)).otherwise(utc_day(parse_ts(c)))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments")
def payments():
    df = _spark().read.text(PATH)
    ts_raw = _pick(TS_FIELDS)
    amount = _pick(AMT_FIELDS).cast("double")
    currency = F.upper(_pick(CCY_FIELDS))
    out = df.select(
        ts_raw.alias("ts_raw"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
    )
    out = out.where(F.col("amount").isNotNull() &
                    F.col("currency").isNotNull() &
                    F.col("ts_raw").isNotNull())
    return out.select(
        utc_day(parse_ts(F.col("ts_raw"))).alias("day"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("amount"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rates")
def rates():
    df = _spark().read.text(PATH)
    amount = _pick(AMT_FIELDS)                 # rate records have no payment amount
    rate = _pick(RATE_FIELDS).cast("double")
    rdate = _pick(RDATE_FIELDS)
    currency = F.upper(_pick(CCY_FIELDS))
    out = df.select(
        amount.alias("amount"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        rdate.alias("rdate"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
    )
    out = out.where(F.col("rate").isNotNull() &
                    F.col("rdate").isNotNull() &
                    F.col("currency").isNotNull() &
                    F.col("amount").isNull())
    return out.select(
        rate_day(F.col("rdate")).alias("day"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("rate"),
    ).dropDuplicates(["day", "currency"])


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    p = _spark().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments")
    r = _spark().read.table("spark_catalog.default.rates")
    joined = p.join(r, ["day", "currency"], "left")
    # recognized = USD, or a rate exists for that day/currency
    recognized = joined.where((F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD")) |
                              F.col("rate").isNotNull())
    usd = F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.col("amount")) \
           .otherwise(F.col("amount") * F.col("rate"))
    return (recognized
            .withColumn("usd", usd)
            .groupBy("day")
            .agg(F.sum("usd").alias("usd_total"))
            .select(F.col("day").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_rejects")
def usd_rejects():
    p = _spark().read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments")
    r = _spark().read.table("spark_catalog.default.rates")
    joined = p.join(r, ["day", "currency"], "left")
    unknown = joined.where((F.col("currency") != F.lit("USD")) &
                           F.col("rate").isNull())
    return unknown.select(
        F.col("day").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("amount"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DATA = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed42.ndjson")

# Explicit schema => every referenced column resolves (null if absent).
# All strings; we cast/parse ourselves so JSON type surprises can't drop rows.
RAW_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("payment_id", StringType()),
    StructField("settlement_id", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("settlement_time", StringType()),
    StructField("settled_at", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("value", StringType()),
    StructField("settled_amount", StringType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", StringType()),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", StringType()),
    StructField("usd_amount", StringType()),
    StructField("usd_value", StringType()),
    StructField("source", StringType()),
    StructField("feed", StringType()),
    StructField("kind", StringType()),
    StructField("type", StringType()),
    StructField("origin", StringType()),
])

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."


def _parse_instant(c):
    # three shapes: epoch-millis, offset-aware, naive(=UTC wall-clock)
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(ts):
    # session-tz-independent UTC calendar day
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_events")
def settlement_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(RAW_SCHEMA).json(DATA)

    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"),
                        F.col("settlement_time"), F.col("settled_at"))
    ts = _parse_instant(ts_raw)
    # if only a bare date column exists, fall back to it
    day = F.coalesce(_utc_day(ts), F.to_date(F.col("date")))

    currency = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("currency_code")))
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"), F.col("settled_amount")).cast("double")
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd")).cast("double")

    usd_direct = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("usd_value")).cast("double")
    usd_calc = F.when(currency == F.lit("USD"), amount).otherwise(amount * rate)
    usd = F.coalesce(usd_direct, usd_calc)

    src = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("source"), F.col("feed"), F.col("kind"),
                             F.col("type"), F.col("origin"), F.lit("internal")))
    is_external = src.rlike(r"bank|extern|recon")

    return df.select(
        day.alias("settlement_date"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount.alias("native_amount"),
        rate.alias("fx_rate"),
        usd.alias("usd_amount"),
        is_external.alias("is_external"),
    ).where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull())


# ---- our internal numbers -------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily_by_currency")
def settlement_daily_by_currency():
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "settlement_events")
    return (ev.where(~F.col("is_external"))
              .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("native_amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
                   F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "settlement_events")
    return (ev.where(~F.col("is_external"))
              .groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# ---- external bank feed ---------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements_by_currency")
def external_settlements_by_currency():
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "settlement_events")
    return (ev.where(F.col("is_external"))
              .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total_external")))


# ---- line-by-line reconciliation -----------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ours = (spark.read.table(CAT + "settlement_daily_by_currency")
                 .select("settlement_date", "currency",
                         F.col("usd_total").alias("usd_total_ours")))
    bank = spark.read.table(CAT + "external_settlements_by_currency")

    j = ours.join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "fullouter")
    o = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_total_ours"), F.lit(0.0))
    b = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_total_external"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(o - b, 2)
    return j.select(
        "settlement_date",
        "currency",
        o.alias("usd_total_ours"),
        b.alias("usd_total_external"),
        diff.alias("usd_diff"),
        F.when(F.col("usd_total_ours").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_ours"))
         .when(F.col("usd_total_external").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_external"))
         .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("reconciled"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")).alias("recon_status"),
    )

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"

# Permissive, inference-free schema: declare every candidate field name.
# Absent fields parse to NULL instead of failing -> safe to coalesce.
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("amount", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("value", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("native_amount", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("currency", StringType(), True),
    StructField("ccy", StringType(), True),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType(), True),
    StructField("ts", StringType(), True),
    StructField("event_time", StringType(), True),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType(), True),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType(), True),
    StructField("settled_at", StringType(), True),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("usd_amount", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("amount_usd", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("usd", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("type", StringType(), True),
    StructField("kind", StringType(), True),
    StructField("source", StringType(), True),
    StructField("feed", StringType(), True),
    StructField("stream", StringType(), True),
    StructField("date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("rate_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("settlement_date", StringType(), True),
])


def _parse_ts(c):
    """Session-tz-independent parse of the three timestamp shapes."""
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(ts):
    """UTC calendar day of an instant, independent of session tz."""
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_raw")
def settlement_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_events")
def settlement_events():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_raw")

    disc = F.lower(F.coalesce(
        F.col("type"), F.col("kind"), F.col("source"),
        F.col("feed"), F.col("stream"), F.lit("payment"),
    ))
    currency = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("currency_code")))
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"), F.col("native_amount"))
    row_rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("usd_rate"))
    usd_amt = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount_usd"), F.col("usd"))
    ts_str = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"),
                        F.col("timestamp"), F.col("settled_at"))
    date_str = F.coalesce(F.col("date"), F.col("rate_date"), F.col("settlement_date"))

    ts = _parse_ts(ts_str)
    # identical bucketing rule for both instant- and pure-date-derived days
    day = F.coalesce(_utc_day(ts), F.to_date(date_str))

    is_external = disc.rlike(r"bank|external|recon")
    is_rate = disc.rlike(r"rate|fx") & ~is_external
    is_payment = ~is_external & ~is_rate

    role = (F.when(is_external, F.lit("external"))
             .when(is_rate, F.lit("rate"))
             .otherwise(F.lit("payment")))

    return df.select(
        day.alias("settlement_date"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount.alias("native_amount"),
        row_rate.alias("row_rate"),
        usd_amt.alias("usd_amount"),
        role.alias("role"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_rejects")
def settlement_rejects():
    """Rows we cannot bucket/convert: keep raw_count == kept + rejected."""
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_events")
    return ev.where(
        (F.col("role") == F.lit("payment"))
        & (F.col("settlement_date").isNull() | F.col("currency").isNull())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_effective")
def fx_rates_effective():
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_events")
    return (ev.where((F.col("role") == F.lit("rate"))
                     & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                     & F.col("currency").isNotNull())
              .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
              .agg(F.max("row_rate").alias("rate_effective")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_events")
    rates = SparkSession.active().read.table("fx_rates_effective")

    internal = ev.where(
        (F.col("role") == F.lit("payment"))
        & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
    )

    j = internal.join(rates, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left")

    # USD converted at the rate effective that day; prefer an explicit usd_amount,
    # else native * (row rate or day rate). USD stays as-is (rate treated as 1).
    eff_rate = F.coalesce(F.col("row_rate"), F.col("rate_effective"),
                          F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)))
    usd = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("native_amount") * eff_rate)

    return (j.withColumn("usd_value", usd)
             .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
             .agg(
                 F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
                 F.round(F.sum("native_amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
             ))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    bycur = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_by_currency")
    return (bycur.groupBy("settlement_date")
                 .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="external_by_currency")
def external_by_currency():
    ev = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_events")
    ext = ev.where(
        (F.col("role") == F.lit("external"))
        & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
    )
    ext_usd = F.coalesce(
        F.col("usd_amount"),
        F.col("native_amount") * F.coalesce(F.col("row_rate"),
                                            F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))),
    )
    return (ext.withColumn("usd_value", ext_usd)
              .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("external_usd")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    internal = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_by_currency")
    external = SparkSession.active().read.table("external_by_currency")

    j = (internal.select("settlement_date", "currency",
                         F.col("usd_total").alias("internal_usd"))
                 .join(external, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer"))

    i = F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
    e = F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(i - e, 2)
    status = (F.when(F.col("internal_usd").isNull(), F.lit("missing_internal"))
               .when(F.col("external_usd").isNull(), F.lit("missing_external"))
               .when(F.abs(diff) <= F.lit(0.01), F.lit("matched"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))

    return j.select(
        "settlement_date",
        "currency",
        F.col("internal_usd"),
        F.col("external_usd"),
        diff.alias("diff_usd"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"

# All string so we can cast tolerantly and never hit UNRESOLVED_COLUMN.
_FIELDS = [
    "type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type",
    "amount", "amt", "val", "value",
    "currency", "ccy", "currency_code",
    "ts", "event_time", "event_ts", "occurred_at",
    "rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd",
    "rate_date", "as_of_date", "the_date", "settlement_date", "date",
    "settled_usd", "amount_usd", "settled_amount", "external_usd",
]
SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(f, T.StringType()) for f in _FIELDS])


def _parse_ts(c):
    c = c.cast("string")
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(c):
    # session-tz-independent UTC calendar day
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(_parse_ts(c), F.current_timezone()))


def _num(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n).cast("double") for n in names])


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_events")
def fx_events():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    amount = _num("amount", "amt", "val", "value")
    currency = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("currency_code")))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("occurred_at"))
    rate = _num("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd")
    date_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("as_of_date"), F.col("the_date"),
                          F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("date"))
    settled = _num("settled_usd", "amount_usd", "settled_amount", "external_usd")
    day = F.coalesce(_utc_day(ts_raw), _utc_day(date_raw))
    return raw.select(
        amount.alias("amount"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        settled.alias("settled_usd"),
        day.alias("day"),
        ts_raw.alias("ts_raw"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table("fx_events")
    return (e.where(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("day").isNotNull())
             .groupBy("currency", "day")
             .agg(F.avg("rate").alias("rate")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_payments")
def settlement_payments():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table("fx_events")
    return (e.where(
                F.col("amount").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull() &
                F.col("day").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNull() & F.col("settled_usd").isNull())
             .select(F.col("day").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("currency"), F.col("amount")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    p = s.read.table("settlement_payments").alias("p")
    r = s.read.table("fx_rates").alias("r")
    j = p.join(r,
               (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) &
               (F.col("p.settlement_date") == F.col("r.day")),
               "left")
    usd_rate = F.coalesce(F.col("r.rate"), F.when(F.col("p.currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)))
    j2 = j.select(
        F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.amount").alias("amount"),
        (F.col("p.amount") * usd_rate).alias("usd_amount"),
    )
    return j2.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency").agg(
        F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
        F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_amount"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_by_currency")
    return (b.groupBy(F.col("settlement_date"))
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table("fx_events")
    return (e.where(F.col("settled_usd").isNotNull() & F.col("day").isNotNull())
             .groupBy(F.col("day").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("currency").alias("currency"))
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("settled_usd"), 2).alias("external_usd")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    b = s.read.table("settlement_by_currency").select("settlement_date", "currency", "usd_amount")
    x = s.read.table("external_settlements")
    j = b.join(x, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    ours = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.lit(0.0))
    theirs = F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(ours - theirs, 2)
    status = (F.when(F.col("usd_amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_ours"))
               .when(F.col("external_usd").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_external"))
               .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("match"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))
    return j.select(
        F.col("settlement_date"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("usd_amount").alias("our_usd"),
        F.col("external_usd"),
        diff.alias("diff_usd"),
        status.alias("status"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed5772.ndjson"
NS = "spark_catalog.default."

# Broad explicit schema -> every column always resolves (null when absent).
SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("kind", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("record_type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_type", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("source", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("value", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("settled_amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("native_amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ccy", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("occurred_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("usd_rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_to_usd", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("effective_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("settlement_date", T.StringType()),
])


def _ts(c):
    # Robust to offset-aware, naive(=UTC wall-clock), and epoch-millis shapes.
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _day(c):
    # UTC calendar day, session-tz independent; also handles date-only strings.
    dateonly = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"), F.to_date(c))
    return F.coalesce(dateonly, F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(_ts(c), F.current_timezone())))


def _amt():
    return F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"), F.col("native_amount"))


def _ccy():
    return F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy")))


def _row_rate():
    return F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("usd_rate"),
                      F.col("rate_to_usd")).cast("double")


def _pay_ts():
    return F.coalesce(F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"),
                      F.col("time"), F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("created_at"),
                      F.col("date"))


def _is_payment():
    rtype = F.col("rtype")
    return rtype.rlike("pay|txn|transaction|charge|order") | (
        _amt().isNotNull() & _ccy().isNotNull()
        & ~rtype.rlike("rate|fx|settle|bank|external|recon")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_events")
def raw_events():
    txt = SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA_PATH)
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA)
    df = txt.select(j.alias("j")).select("j.*")
    rtype = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("type"), F.col("kind"), F.col("record_type"),
                               F.col("event_type"), F.col("source"), F.lit("")))
    return df.withColumn("rtype", rtype)


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "raw_events")
    day = _day(_pay_ts())
    out = df.filter(_is_payment()).select(
        day.alias("settlement_date"),
        _ccy().alias("currency"),
        _amt().cast("double").alias("native_amount"),
        _row_rate().alias("row_rate"),
    )
    return out.filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("native_amount").isNotNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_rejects")
def settlement_rejects():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "raw_events")
    day = _day(_pay_ts())
    bad = _is_payment() & (day.isNull() | _ccy().isNull() | _amt().cast("double").isNull())
    return df.filter(bad).select(
        F.col("rtype"),
        _amt().alias("raw_amount"),
        _ccy().alias("raw_currency"),
        _pay_ts().alias("raw_timestamp"),
        F.lit("unparseable_payment").alias("reject_reason"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "raw_events")
    rday = _day(F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("effective_date"),
                           F.col("date"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_time")))
    return (df.filter(F.col("rtype").rlike("rate|fx"))
              .select(rday.alias("rate_date"), _ccy().alias("rate_ccy"),
                      _row_rate().alias("rate"))
              .filter(F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_ccy").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_usd")
def payments_usd():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "payments_parsed").alias("p")
    r = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "fx_rates").alias("r")
    joined = p.join(
        r,
        (F.col("p.settlement_date") == F.col("r.rate_date"))
        & (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.rate_ccy")),
        "left",
    )
    rate = F.coalesce(
        F.col("p.row_rate"),
        F.col("r.rate"),
        F.when(F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)),
    )
    usd = F.col("p.native_amount") * rate
    return joined.select(
        F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.native_amount").alias("native_amount"),
        usd.alias("usd_amount"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "payments_usd")
    return (df.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
              .agg(F.sum("native_amount").alias("native_total"),
                   F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "settlement_by_currency")
    return df.groupBy("settlement_date").agg(F.sum("usd_total").alias("usd_total"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "raw_events")
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("settled_amount"), F.col("amount"), F.col("value")).cast("double")
    d = _day(F.coalesce(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("date"),
                        F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_time")))
    return (df.filter(F.col("rtype").rlike("settle|bank|external|recon"))
              .select(d.alias("settlement_date"), _ccy().alias("currency"),
                      amt.alias("ext_amount"))
              .filter(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                      & F.col("currency").isNotNull()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    o = SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "settlement_by_currency").alias("o")
    e = (SparkSession.active().read.table(NS + "external_settlements")
         .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
         .agg(F.sum("ext_amount").alias("ext_total")).alias("e"))
    j = o.join(
        e,
        (F.col("o.settlement_date") == F.col("e.settlement_date"))
        & (F.col("o.currency") == F.col("e.currency")),
        "full_outer",
    )
    sdate = F.coalesce(F.col("o.settlement_date"), F.col("e.settlement_date"))
    ccy = F.coalesce(F.col("o.currency"), F.col("e.currency"))
    ours = F.coalesce(F.col("o.usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    theirs = F.coalesce(F.col("e.ext_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = ours - theirs
    status = (F.when(F.col("o.currency").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_ours"))
                .when(F.col("e.currency").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_external"))
                .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("match"))
                .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))
    return j.select(
        sdate.alias("settlement_date"),
        ccy.alias("currency"),
        ours.alias("our_total"),
        theirs.alias("external_total"),
        diff.alias("difference"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed9001.ndjson"

# Explicit, superset schema -> referencing any of these is always resolvable.
SCHEMA = T.StructType([

    T.StructField("timestamp",  T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts",         T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_ts",   T.StringType()),

    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("currency",   T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ccy",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("curr",       T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount",         T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("value",          T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("amt",            T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("settled_amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd_amount", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("amount_usd", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("usd",        T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("rate",          T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate",       T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("exchange_rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("rate_usd",      T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("source",      T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("type",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("kind",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("feed",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("side",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("record_type", T.StringType()),
])


def _ts_col():
    c = F.coalesce(
        F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("ts"),
        F.col("event_ts"), F.col("settled_at"), F.col("created_at"),
    )
    is_epoch = c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$")
    has_zone = c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$")
    tagged = F.when(has_zone, c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return (F.when(is_epoch, (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
             .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged)))


def _utc_day(ts):
    # session-tz-independent UTC calendar day
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


def _currency():
    return F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("curr")))


def _usd():
    native = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"),
                        F.col("amt"), F.col("settled_amount"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"),
                      F.col("exchange_rate"), F.col("rate_usd"),
                      F.when(_currency() == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)))
    direct = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount_usd"), F.col("usd"))
    return F.coalesce(direct, native * rate)


def _is_external():
    src = F.lower(F.coalesce(
        F.col("source"), F.col("type"), F.col("kind"),
        F.col("feed"), F.col("side"), F.col("record_type"), F.lit("internal")))
    return src.rlike("bank|external|settle")


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_input")
def settlement_input():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    ts = _ts_col()
    return (df
            .withColumn("ts", ts)
            .withColumn("settlement_date", _utc_day(F.col("ts")))
            .withColumn("currency", _currency())
            .withColumn("usd_value", _usd())
            .withColumn("native_value",
                        F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"),
                                   F.col("amt"), F.col("settled_amount"),
                                   F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount_usd"),
                                   F.col("usd")))
            .withColumn("is_external", _is_external())
            .select("settlement_date", "currency", "usd_value",
                    "native_value", "is_external", "ts"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_rejects")
def settlement_rejects():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_input")
    return src.where(F.col("ts").isNull() | F.col("settlement_date").isNull()
                     | F.col("usd_value").isNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_valid")
def settlement_valid():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_input")
    return src.where(F.col("ts").isNotNull() & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                     & F.col("usd_value").isNotNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_valid")
    return (src.where(~F.col("is_external"))
               .groupBy("settlement_date")
               .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
               .select("settlement_date", "usd_total"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_valid")
    return (src.where(~F.col("is_external"))
               .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
               .agg(F.round(F.sum("native_value"), 2).alias("native_total"),
                    F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
               .select("settlement_date", "currency", "native_total", "usd_total"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_valid")
    internal = (src.where(~F.col("is_external"))
                   .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                   .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("internal_usd")))
    external = (src.where(F.col("is_external"))
                   .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                   .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("external_usd")))
    j = internal.join(external, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    diff = (F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
            - F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0)))
    status = (F.when(F.col("internal_usd").isNull(), F.lit("missing_internal"))
               .when(F.col("external_usd").isNull(), F.lit("missing_external"))
               .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("match"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))
    return j.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency",
        F.col("internal_usd"), F.col("external_usd"),
        F.round(diff, 2).alias("usd_diff"),
        status.alias("recon_status"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DATA = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed11235.ndjson")

CAT = "spark_catalog.default"

# Broad union schema: any field the generator actually emits is picked up;
# fields it doesn't emit are simply NULL (never UNRESOLVED_COLUMN).
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("payment_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    # timestamp candidates
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("settled_at", StringType()),

    # currency candidates
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("curr", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    # amount candidates
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("settled_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("gross", DoubleType()),
    # usd amount (already converted) candidates
    StructField("usd_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("amount_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_value", DoubleType()),
    # rate candidates
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),

    StructField("source", StringType()),

    StructField("record_type", StringType()),
    StructField("type", StringType()),

])


def _ts_col():
    c = F.coalesce(
        F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
        F.col("created_at"), F.col("settled_at"), F.col("txn_time"),
    )
    # epoch-millis branch
    epoch = (c.cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")
    # offset-aware kept as-is; naive tagged UTC before parse
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    parsed = F.to_timestamp(tagged)
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), epoch).otherwise(parsed)


def _day_col(ts):
    # UTC calendar day, independent of session timezone
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_raw")
def payments_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.payments_raw")
    ts = _ts_col()
    currency = F.upper(F.coalesce(
        F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("curr"), F.col("currency_code")))
    amount = F.coalesce(
        F.col("amount"), F.col("value"), F.col("settled_amount"), F.col("gross"))
    rate = F.coalesce(
        F.col("usd_rate"), F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"),
        F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("exchange_rate"),
        F.when(currency == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)))
    usd = F.coalesce(
        F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount_usd"), F.col("usd_value"),
        amount * rate)
    rec_type = F.lower(F.coalesce(
        F.col("source"), F.col("feed"), F.col("record_type"),
        F.col("type"), F.col("kind"), F.lit("")))
    is_external = rec_type.isin(
        "bank", "external", "settlement", "bank_settlement",
        "external_settlement", "banks", "recon")

    day = _day_col(ts)
    return (
        df.select(
            day.alias("settlement_date"),
            currency.alias("currency"),
            amount.alias("native_amount"),
            usd.alias("usd_amount"),
            is_external.alias("is_external"),
        )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_rejects")
def settlement_rejects():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.payments_parsed")

@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_clean")

          .where(~F.col("is_external")))
    return (
        df.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(
              F.round(F.sum("native_amount"), 2).alias("currency_total"),

          )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
