    return (
        df.groupBy("settlement_date")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
    )


# ---- External (bank) settlement figures ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlement_by_currency")
def external_settlement_by_currency():
    df = (SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.settlement_clean")
          .where(F.col("is_external")))
    return (
        df.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(
              F.round(F.sum("native_amount"), 2).alias("ext_currency_total"),
              F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("ext_usd_total"),
          )
    )


# ---- Line-by-line reconciliation ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    ours = SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.settlement_by_currency")
    ext = SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CAT}.external_settlement_by_currency")
    joined = ours.join(ext, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    usd_ours = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    usd_ext = F.coalesce(F.col("ext_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(usd_ours - usd_ext, 2)
    status = (
        F.when(F.col("usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_INTERNAL"))
         .when(F.col("ext_usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_EXTERNAL"))
         .when(F.abs(diff) <= F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH"))
    )
    return joined.select(
        "settlement_date",
        "currency",
        F.coalesce(F.col("usd_total"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("usd_internal"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("ext_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("usd_external"),
        diff.alias("usd_diff"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed27182.ndjson"

# Explicit superset schema -> every referenced column always resolves (null if absent).
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("type", StringType()), StructField("record_type", StringType()),
    StructField("kind", StringType()), StructField("event_type", StringType()),
    StructField("source", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()), StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()), StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()), StructField("occurred_at", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()), StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()), StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()), StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_rate", DoubleType()), StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_per_unit", DoubleType()),
    StructField("settlement_date", StringType()), StructField("rate_date", StringType()),
    StructField("as_of_date", StringType()), StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("usd", DoubleType()), StructField("usd_amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("amount_usd", DoubleType()), StructField("settled_usd", DoubleType()),
])


def _parse_instant(c):
    """Handle offset-aware, naive(UTC wall-clock) and epoch-millis timestamp shapes."""
    c = c.cast("string")
    epoch = (c.cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), epoch).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day(ts):
    # session-tz independent UTC calendar day of an instant
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_base")
def settlement_base():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy"), F.col("currency_code")))
    amount = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("occurred_at"), F.col("ts"),
                        F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_ts"), F.col("created_at"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("usd_rate"),
                      F.col("rate_to_usd"), F.col("usd_per_unit"))
    date_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("rate_date"),
                          F.col("as_of_date"), F.col("date"))
    usd = F.coalesce(F.col("usd"), F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount_usd"), F.col("settled_usd"))
    tnorm = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("type"), F.col("record_type"), F.col("kind"),
                               F.col("event_type"), F.col("source"), F.lit("")))
    known = tnorm.rlike(r"pay|rate|fx|settl")

    ts = _parse_instant(ts_raw)
    return (df.select(
        tnorm.alias("tnorm"), known.alias("known"),
        ccy.alias("ccy"), amount.alias("amount"),
        ts_raw.alias("ts_raw"), ts.alias("ts"),
        _utc_day(ts).alias("event_day"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        F.to_date(date_raw).alias("row_date"),
        usd.alias("usd"),
    )
    .withColumn("is_settlement",
        F.col("tnorm").rlike(r"settl") | (~F.col("known") & F.col("usd").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNull()))
    .withColumn("is_rate",
        F.col("tnorm").rlike(r"rate|fx") | (~F.col("known") & F.col("rate").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNull()))
    .withColumn("is_payment",
        F.col("tnorm").rlike(r"pay") | (~F.col("known") & F.col("amount").isNotNull() & F.col("usd").isNull())))


# ---- payments: valid vs quarantined (raw == kept + rejected) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="payment_events")
def payment_events():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_base")
    return (b.where(F.col("is_payment"))
             .where(F.col("event_day").isNotNull() & F.col("ccy").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNotNull())
             .select("event_day", "ccy", "amount"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payment_rejects")
def payment_rejects():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_base")
    return (b.where(F.col("is_payment"))
             .where(F.col("event_day").isNull() | F.col("ccy").isNull() | F.col("amount").isNull())
             .select("ts_raw", "ccy", "amount"))


# ---- daily fx rates, deterministic pick per (day, ccy) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_daily")
def fx_rates_daily():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_base")
    return (b.where(F.col("is_rate") & F.col("row_date").isNotNull() & F.col("ccy").isNotNull()
                    & F.col("rate").isNotNull())
             .groupBy(F.col("row_date").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("ccy").alias("currency"))
             .agg(F.max("rate").alias("rate")))


# ---- per-currency USD (payments converted at that day's rate) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payment_events")
           .groupBy("event_day", "ccy")
           .agg(F.sum("amount").alias("native_total")))
    rates = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_rates_daily")
    joined = pay.join(rates,
                      (pay["event_day"] == rates["settlement_date"]) & (pay["ccy"] == rates["currency"]),
                      "left")
    return joined.select(
        pay["event_day"].alias("settlement_date"),
        pay["ccy"].alias("currency"),
        F.round(F.col("native_total"), 2).alias("native_total"),
        F.col("rate"),
        F.round(F.col("native_total") * F.col("rate"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
    )


# ---- contract table: daily USD totals ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_by_currency")
    return (b.groupBy("settlement_date")
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# ---- external bank settlements feed, per (day, ccy) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_base")
    return (b.where(F.col("is_settlement") & F.col("row_date").isNotNull()
                    & F.col("ccy").isNotNull() & F.col("usd").isNotNull())
             .groupBy(F.col("row_date").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("ccy").alias("currency"))
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd"), 2).alias("bank_usd_total")))


# ---- line-by-line reconciliation (full outer: surfaces missing currencies) ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ours = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_by_currency")
            .select("settlement_date", "currency", F.col("usd_total").alias("our_usd_total")))
    bank = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.external_settlements")
    j = ours.join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    diff = F.round(F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
                   - F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0)), 2)
    return j.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency",
        F.col("our_usd_total"), F.col("bank_usd_total"),
        diff.alias("diff_usd"),
        F.when(F.col("our_usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_ours"))
         .when(F.col("bank_usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_bank"))
         .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("matched"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")).alias("recon_status"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed31415.ndjson"
CAT = "spark_catalog.default."

def _S():
    return SparkSession.active()

def _rt(name):
    return _S().read.table(CAT + name)

# ---- tolerant JSON schema: every plausible key, all StringType ----
_FIELDS = [
    "type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type", "feed", "source",
    "amount", "value", "native_amount", "amount_native",
    "currency", "ccy", "currency_code",
    "timestamp", "event_time", "ts", "created_at", "settlement_time", "occurred_at",
    "date", "settlement_date", "rate_date", "as_of", "value_date",
    "rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "conversion_rate",
    "usd_amount", "usd_total", "usd", "usd_value", "amount_usd",
]
_SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(f, T.StringType(), True) for f in _FIELDS])

def _first(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col("j." + n) for n in names])

def _num(c):
    return F.regexp_replace(c.cast("string"), r"[^0-9eE.\-]", "").cast("double")

def _instant(c):
    c = c.cast("string")
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))

def _utc_day(c):
    c = c.cast("string")
    date_only = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$"), F.to_date(c))
    ts = _instant(c)
    # session-tz-independent UTC calendar day
    return F.coalesce(date_only, F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone())))


# ---------- bronze: parse & classify every record ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_records")
def parsed_records():
    raw = _S().read.text(DATA)
    j = raw.select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), _SCHEMA).alias("j"))

    type_norm = F.lower(_first("type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type", "feed", "source"))
    currency = F.upper(_first("currency", "ccy", "currency_code"))
    amount = _num(_first("amount", "value", "native_amount", "amount_native"))
    rate = _num(_first("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "conversion_rate"))
    usd_amt = _num(_first("usd_amount", "usd_total", "usd", "usd_value", "amount_usd"))
    day = _utc_day(_first("timestamp", "event_time", "ts", "created_at",
                          "settlement_time", "occurred_at", "date",
                          "settlement_date", "rate_date", "as_of", "value_date"))

    cls = (
        F.when(type_norm.rlike(r"rate|^fx$|fx_"), F.lit("rate"))
         .when(type_norm.rlike(r"settle|bank|external|recon"), F.lit("external"))
         .when(type_norm.rlike(r"pay|txn|transaction|charge|order"), F.lit("payment"))
         # fall back on field-presence when no discriminator exists
         .when(rate.isNotNull() & amount.isNull(), F.lit("rate"))
         .when(usd_amt.isNotNull() & amount.isNull(), F.lit("external"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("payment"))
    )

    return j.select(
        cls.alias("cls"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        usd_amt.alias("usd_amt"),
        day.alias("day"),
    )


# ---------- fx rates dim: one deterministic rate per (day, currency) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():
    r = _rt("parsed_records").where(F.col("cls") == "rate")
    return (r.where(F.col("day").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                    & F.col("rate").isNotNull())
             .groupBy("day", "currency")
             .agg(F.max("rate").alias("rate")))


# ---------- payments quarantine ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="payment_rejects")
def payment_rejects():
    p = _rt("parsed_records").where(F.col("cls") == "payment")
    return p.where(F.col("day").isNull() | F.col("amount").isNull()
                   | F.col("currency").isNull())


# ---------- per-currency daily settlement (USD converted at that day's rate) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    p = (_rt("parsed_records").where(F.col("cls") == "payment")
         .where(F.col("day").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
                & F.col("currency").isNotNull())
         .select(F.col("day").alias("settlement_date"),
                 F.col("currency"),
                 F.col("amount"),
                 F.col("rate").alias("embedded_rate")))

    fx = _rt("fx_rates").select(
        F.col("day").alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("rate").alias("day_rate"))

    eff = (p.join(fx, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "left")
            .withColumn("eff_rate",
                        F.coalesce(F.col("embedded_rate"),
                                   F.col("day_rate"),
                                   F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0))))
            .withColumn("usd", F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate")))

    return (eff.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
               .agg(F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
                    F.round(F.sum("usd"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
                    F.max(F.col("eff_rate")).alias("rate_used")))


# ---------- contract table: daily USD totals ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    return (_rt("settlement_by_currency")
            .groupBy(F.col("settlement_date"))
            .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# ---------- external bank settlements feed, normalized per (day, currency) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    e = _rt("parsed_records").where(F.col("cls") == "external")
    return (e.where(F.col("day").isNotNull())
             .groupBy(F.col("day").alias("settlement_date"), F.col("currency"))
             .agg(F.round(F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amt"), F.lit(0.0))), 2)
                   .alias("bank_usd_total")))


# ---------- line-by-line reconciliation ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    ours = _rt("settlement_by_currency").select(
        "settlement_date", "currency",
        F.col("usd_total").alias("our_usd_total"))
    bank = _rt("external_settlements")

    rec = ours.join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    diff = (F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0))
            - F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd_total"), F.lit(0.0)))

    status = (F.when(F.col("our_usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_ours"))
               .when(F.col("bank_usd_total").isNull(), F.lit("missing_in_bank"))
               .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("match"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))

    return rec.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency",
        "our_usd_total", "bank_usd_total",
        F.round(diff, 2).alias("usd_diff"),
        status.alias("recon_status"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.tzfix/_data/gen_payments_seed16180.ndjson"

# Superset schema -> columns absent in a given record become NULL (null-safe coalesce).
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("type", StringType()),
    StructField("record_type", StringType()),
    StructField("event_id", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("ccy", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("value", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate_date", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType()),
    StructField("rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("fx_rate", DoubleType()),
    StructField("settlement_date", StringType()),
    StructField("usd_total", DoubleType()),
    StructField("usd_amount", DoubleType()),
])

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."


def parse_ts(col):
    """Handle offset-aware, naive(UTC wall-clock), and epoch-millis timestamps."""
    epoch = (col.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp")
    tagged = F.when(col.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), col).otherwise(F.concat(col, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.when(col.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), epoch).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def utc_day(ts):
    # tz-independent UTC calendar day of an instant
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


def rtype(df):
    return F.coalesce(df["type"], df["record_type"])


# ---------- raw ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_events")
def raw_events():
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)


# ---------- payments (parsed to UTC day) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "raw_events")
    tcol = rtype(df)
    tsraw = F.coalesce(df["event_time"], df["timestamp"], df["ts"])
    ts = parse_ts(tsraw)
    amt = F.coalesce(df["amount"], df["value"]).cast("double")
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(df["currency"], df["ccy"]))
    is_payment = (tcol == F.lit("payment")) | (tcol.isNull() & tsraw.isNotNull())
    return (df.where(is_payment & ts.isNotNull())
              .select(utc_day(ts).alias("settlement_date"),
                      ccy.alias("currency"),
                      amt.alias("amount_native")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_rejects")
def payments_rejects():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "raw_events")
    tcol = rtype(df)
    tsraw = F.coalesce(df["event_time"], df["timestamp"], df["ts"])
    ts = parse_ts(tsraw)
    is_payment = (tcol == F.lit("payment")) | (tcol.isNull() & tsraw.isNotNull())
    return (df.where(is_payment & ts.isNull())
              .select(tsraw.alias("raw_timestamp"),
                      F.coalesce(df["currency"], df["ccy"]).alias("currency"),
                      F.coalesce(df["amount"], df["value"]).alias("amount"),
                      F.lit("unparseable_timestamp").alias("reject_reason")))


# ---------- fx rates effective per day ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates")
def fx_rates():

    tcol = rtype(df)
    rate = F.coalesce(df["rate_to_usd"], df["rate"], df["fx_rate"]).cast("double")
    rdate = F.to_date(F.coalesce(df["rate_date"], df["date"]))
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(df["currency"], df["ccy"]))
    return (df.where((tcol == F.lit("fx_rate")) & rdate.isNotNull())
              .select(rdate.alias("settlement_date"),
                      ccy.alias("currency"),
                      rate.alias("rate_to_usd")))


# ---------- external settlements feed ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="external_settlements")
def external_settlements():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "raw_events")
    tcol = rtype(df)
    sdate = F.to_date(F.coalesce(df["settlement_date"], df["date"]))
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(df["currency"], df["ccy"]))
    usd = F.coalesce(df["usd_total"], df["usd_amount"], df["amount"], df["value"]).cast("double")
    return (df.where((tcol == F.lit("settlement")) & sdate.isNotNull())
              .select(sdate.alias("settlement_date"),
                      ccy.alias("currency"),
                      usd.alias("usd_total_external")))


# ---------- per-currency breakdown (USD converted at that day's rate) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table(CAT + "payments_parsed").alias("p")
    r = spark.read.table(CAT + "fx_rates").alias("r")
    joined = p.join(
        r,
        (F.col("p.settlement_date") == F.col("r.settlement_date"))
        & (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")),
        "left",
    )
    rate_eff = F.when(F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r.rate_to_usd"))
    return (joined.groupBy(
                F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
                F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"))
            .agg(F.round(F.sum(F.col("p.amount_native")), 2).alias("currency_total"),
                 F.round(F.sum(F.col("p.amount_native") * rate_eff), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# ---------- contract table: daily USD total ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "settlement_by_currency")
    return (df.groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# ---------- line-by-line reconciliation vs external feed ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    internal = (spark.read.table(CAT + "settlement_by_currency")
                .select("settlement_date", "currency",
                        F.col("usd_total").alias("usd_internal"))
                .alias("i"))
    external = spark.read.table(CAT + "external_settlements").alias("e")
    j = internal.join(
        external,
        (F.col("i.settlement_date") == F.col("e.settlement_date"))
        & (F.col("i.currency") == F.col("e.currency")),
        "full_outer",
    )
    sdate = F.coalesce(F.col("i.settlement_date"), F.col("e.settlement_date"))
    ccy = F.coalesce(F.col("i.currency"), F.col("e.currency"))
    ui = F.col("i.usd_internal")
    ue = F.round(F.col("e.usd_total_external"), 2)
    diff = F.round(F.coalesce(ui, F.lit(0.0)) - F.coalesce(ue, F.lit(0.0)), 2)
    status = (F.when(ui.isNull(), F.lit("missing_internal"))
               .when(ue.isNull(), F.lit("missing_external"))
               .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("match"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("mismatch")))
    return j.select(sdate.alias("settlement_date"),
                    ccy.alias("currency"),
                    ui.alias("usd_internal"),
                    ue.alias("usd_total_external"),
                    diff.alias("usd_diff"),
                    status.alias("recon_status"))

SCHEMA = T.StructType([

    T.StructField("time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("fx_rate", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("rate_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("effective_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),

    T.StructField("settlement_date", T.StringType()),
])


def _parse_ts(c):
    """Robustly parse offset-aware / naive-UTC / epoch-millis timestamp strings."""
    c = c.cast("string")
    epoch = (c.cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp")
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), epoch).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def _utc_day_from_ts(c):
    """UTC calendar day of an instant, independent of session tz."""
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(_parse_ts(c), F.current_timezone()))


def _utc_day_from_date(c):
    """Plain date string (no time) -> DATE, tz-independent."""
    c = c.cast("string")
    # try direct date, else fall back to instant-based bucketing
    d = F.to_date(c)
    return F.coalesce(d, _utc_day_from_ts(c))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_raw")
def settlement_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA_PATH)

                             F.col("event_type"), F.lit("")))
    ccy = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy")))
    amt = F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("value"))
    tsr = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("ts"),
                     F.col("created_at"), F.col("time"))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate").cast("double"))
    ratedt = F.coalesce(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("effective_date"), F.col("date"))
    ext_usd = F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount_usd"), F.col("settled_usd"))
    setdt = F.coalesce(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("date"), F.col("event_time"),
                       F.col("timestamp"))
    return df.select(

        ccy.alias("currency"),
        amt.alias("amount"),
        tsr.alias("ts_raw"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        ratedt.alias("rate_date_raw"),

@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_payments")
def settlement_payments():

        | ((~F.col("rec_type").rlike("rate|fx|settle|external|bank"))
           & F.col("amount").isNotNull() & F.col("ts_raw").isNotNull())
    )
    return (pay
            .withColumn("settlement_date", _utc_day_from_ts(F.col("ts_raw")))
            .where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("amount").isNotNull())

            .select("rec_type", "currency", "amount", "ts_raw"))


# ---- FX rates effective per day/currency -------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_fx_rates")
def settlement_fx_rates():

            .where(F.col("rate_date").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull())

            .agg(F.max("rate").alias("rate")))


# ---- external settlements feed (the bank) ------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_external")
def settlement_external():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_raw")
    ext = src.where(F.col("rec_type").rlike("settle|external|bank"))
    day = F.coalesce(_utc_day_from_date(F.col("set_date_raw")),
                     _utc_day_from_ts(F.col("set_date_raw")))
    return (ext
            .withColumn("settlement_date", day)
            .where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull())
            .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
            .agg(F.round(F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("ext_usd"), F.col("amount"))), 2)
                 .alias("external_usd")))


# ---- per-currency breakdown (native total + USD via that-day rate) -----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("settlement_payments")
    rates = spark.read.table("settlement_fx_rates")
    agg = (pay.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
              .agg(F.sum("amount").alias("currency_total")))
    joined = agg.join(
        rates,
        (agg["settlement_date"] == rates["rate_date"])
        & (agg["currency"] == rates["currency"]),
        "left",
    )
    # USD stays 1:1; other currencies use the effective rate (rate = units per USD-> guard both)
    rate = F.when(agg["currency"] == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(rates["rate"])
    usd = F.round(agg["currency_total"] * rate, 2)
    return joined.select(
        agg["settlement_date"].alias("settlement_date"),
        agg["currency"].alias("currency"),
        F.round(agg["currency_total"], 2).alias("currency_total"),
        rate.alias("rate"),
        usd.alias("usd_total"),
    )


# ---- daily USD total (the contract table) ------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    bc = SparkSession.active().read.table("settlement_by_currency")
    return (bc.groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_total"), 2).alias("usd_total")))


# ---- line-by-line reconciliation vs the external feed ------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ours = spark.read.table("settlement_by_currency").select(
        F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("currency"), F.col("usd_total").alias("our_usd"))
    ext = spark.read.table("settlement_external")
    j = ours.join(
        ext,
        (ours["settlement_date"] == ext["settlement_date"])
        & (ours["currency"] == ext["currency"]),
        "full_outer",
    )
    sdate = F.coalesce(ours["settlement_date"], ext["settlement_date"])
    ccy = F.coalesce(ours["currency"], ext["currency"])
    our_usd = F.coalesce(ours["our_usd"], F.lit(0.0))
    ext_usd = F.coalesce(ext["external_usd"], F.lit(0.0))
    diff = F.round(our_usd - ext_usd, 2)
    status = (F.when(ours["our_usd"].isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_IN_OURS"))
               .when(ext["external_usd"].isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_IN_EXTERNAL"))
               .when(F.abs(diff) <= F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH")))
    return j.select(
        sdate.alias("settlement_date"),
        ccy.alias("currency"),
        F.round(our_usd, 2).alias("our_usd"),
        F.round(ext_usd, 2).alias("external_usd"),
        diff.alias("diff_usd"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )

    tagged = F.when(has_off, c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), epoch).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(tagged))

CAT = "spark_catalog.default"


# ---- resolve real column names once, at import (NOT inside a query fn) -------
def _pick(cols, candidates, default):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:               # exact (case-insensitive) first
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in candidates:               # substring fallback
        for lc, orig in low.items():
            if cand in lc:
                return orig
    return default


def _resolve():
    d = dict(
        PAY_ID="payment_id", PAY_CCY="currency", PAY_AMT="amount", PAY_TS="event_time",
        FX_CCY="currency", FX_RATE="rate", FX_TS="rate_time",
    )
    try:
        s = SparkSession.active()
        pc = s.read.json(PAY_PATH).columns
        fc = s.read.json(FX_PATH).columns
        d["PAY_ID"]  = _pick(pc, ["payment_id", "transaction_id", "txn_id", "pay_id", "event_id", "id"], d["PAY_ID"])
        d["PAY_CCY"] = _pick(pc, ["currency", "currency_code", "ccy", "cur"], d["PAY_CCY"])
        d["PAY_AMT"] = _pick(pc, ["foreign_amount", "amount_foreign", "foreign_value", "amount", "amt", "value"], d["PAY_AMT"])
        d["PAY_TS"]  = _pick(pc, ["event_time", "occurred_at", "payment_time", "paid_at", "created_at", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "time"], d["PAY_TS"])
        d["FX_CCY"]  = _pick(fc, ["currency", "currency_code", "ccy", "cur"], d["FX_CCY"])
        d["FX_RATE"] = _pick(fc, ["rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_rate", "conversion_rate", "price"], d["FX_RATE"])
        d["FX_TS"]   = _pick(fc, ["rate_time", "effective_time", "effective_at", "valid_from", "as_of", "event_time", "updated_at", "rate_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "time"], d["FX_TS"])
    except Exception:
        pass
    return d


C = _resolve()


# ---- robust, session-tz-independent helpers ---------------------------------
def parse_ts(c):
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def utc_day(ts):
    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))


# ---- enriched payments: as-of join to the rate in effect --------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="enriched_payments")
def enriched_payments():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    pay = (
        spark.read.json(PAY_PATH)
        .select(
            F.col(C["PAY_ID"]).cast("string").alias("payment_id"),
            F.upper(F.col(C["PAY_CCY"]).cast("string")).alias("currency"),
            F.col(C["PAY_AMT"]).cast("double").alias("foreign_amount"),
            F.col(C["PAY_TS"]).cast("string").alias("pay_ts_raw"),
        )
        .withColumn("pay_ts", parse_ts(F.col("pay_ts_raw")))
    )

    fx = (
        spark.read.json(FX_PATH)
        .select(
            F.upper(F.col(C["FX_CCY"]).cast("string")).alias("fx_currency"),
            F.col(C["FX_RATE"]).cast("double").alias("fx_rate"),
            F.col(C["FX_TS"]).cast("string").alias("rate_ts_raw"),
        )
        .withColumn("fx_rate_ts", parse_ts(F.col("rate_ts_raw")))
    )

    # left join keeps every payment; condition enforces "no rate after the payment"
    joined = pay.join(
        fx,
        (F.col("currency") == F.col("fx_currency")) & (F.col("fx_rate_ts") <= F.col("pay_ts")),
        "left",
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("payment_id").orderBy(F.col("fx_rate_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    latest = joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    out = (
        latest
        .withColumn(
            "applied_rate",
            F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("fx_rate")),
        )
        .withColumn(
            "rate_ts",
            F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.col("pay_ts")).otherwise(F.col("fx_rate_ts")),
        )
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("applied_rate"))
        .withColumn("settlement_date", utc_day(F.col("pay_ts")))
    )

    return out.select(
        "payment_id",
        "currency",
        "foreign_amount",
        "pay_ts",
        "applied_rate",
        "rate_ts",          # as-applied rate timestamp carried through for audit
        "usd_amount",
        "settlement_date",
    )

        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"), "usd_total")
    )

    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))


def utc_day(ts):

    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))

    "ts", "as_of", "effective_time", "rate_ts", "event_time",

]])


def _parse_ts(c):

    c = c.cast("string")
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))

        .withColumn("currency", F.coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code"))
        .withColumn("amount",
                    F.coalesce("amount", "amount_foreign", "foreign_amount", "value", "amt").cast("double"))
        .withColumn("pay_ts",

        .withColumn("row_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # Latest qualifying rate per payment (real rates rank above the null sentinel).
    w = Window.partitionBy("row_id").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last())

        .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    "ts", "timestamp", "effective_time", "effective_at", "as_of",
    "valid_from", "event_time", "rate_ts",
]


def _schema(fields):
    return StructType([StructField(f, StringType(), True) for f in fields])


def _first(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])


def _parse_ts(c):
    # 1) epoch-millis (all-digit, >=13 chars)
    epoch = F.when(c.rlike(r"^\d{13,}$"), (c.cast("double") / 1000).cast("timestamp"))
    # 2) offset-aware kept as-is; naive tagged as UTC before parse
    tagged = F.when(c.rlike(r"(Z|[+-]\d{2}:?\d{2})$"), c).otherwise(F.concat(c, F.lit("Z")))
    return F.coalesce(epoch, F.to_timestamp(tagged))

    return F.to_date(F.to_utc_timestamp(ts, F.current_timezone()))

    return (

    return p.where(F.col("pay_ts").isNull() | F.col("amount_foreign").isNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="rates_parsed")
def rates_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(_schema(FX_FIELDS)).json(FX_PATH)
    ts_raw = _first("ts", "timestamp", "effective_time", "effective_at",
                    "as_of", "valid_from", "event_time", "rate_ts")
    return (
        df
        .withColumn("rate_currency", _first("currency", "ccy", "curr"))
        .withColumn("rate_value",
                    _first("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "value").cast("double"))
        .withColumn("rate_ts", _parse_ts(ts_raw))
        .select("rate_currency", "rate_value", "rate_ts")
        .where(F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_value").isNotNull())
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")
def payments_enriched():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_valid")
    rates = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.rates_parsed")

    # As-of join: only rates effective at or before the payment instant.
    cond = (pay["currency"] == rates["rate_currency"]) & (rates["rate_ts"] <= pay["pay_ts"])
    joined = pay.join(rates, cond, "left")

    # Pick the latest such rate per payment (most recent rate_ts <= pay_ts).
    w = Window.partitionBy("payment_id").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    ranked = joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    # USD passes through at rate 1.0; audit timestamp = payment instant when no rate row.
    rate_applied = F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD",
                          F.coalesce(F.col("rate_value"), F.lit(1.0))
                          ).otherwise(F.col("rate_value"))
    rate_ts_applied = F.when((F.col("currency") == "USD") & F.col("rate_ts").isNull(),
                             F.col("pay_ts")).otherwise(F.col("rate_ts"))

    return (
        ranked
        .withColumn("fx_rate_applied", rate_applied)
        .withColumn("rate_ts_applied", rate_ts_applied)
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount_foreign") * F.col("fx_rate_applied"))
        .withColumn("settlement_date", _utc_day(F.col("pay_ts")))
        .select("payment_id", "currency", "amount_foreign", "pay_ts",
                "fx_rate_applied", "rate_ts_applied", "usd_amount", "settlement_date")
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_enriched")
    return (
        e.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select("settlement_date", "usd_total")
    )
